# Portfolio Site Build

## Tech Stack

- **Vite** (already installed) + `@vitejs/plugin-react`
- **React 18** + **React Router v6** (client-side SPA routing)
- **Framer Motion** (page transitions, scroll reveals, hover states)
- Plain CSS (no Tailwind) — one `index.css` file with CSS custom properties

## Aesthetic & Design Tokens

- Background: `#fafafa` (off-white), Text: `#111` (near-black), Muted: `#888`
- Accent: warm indigo `#4f46e5`
- Typography: Inter via Google Fonts — `400` body, `500` medium, `600` semi-bold
- 8px spacing grid, no heavy borders — whitespace and subtle shadows do the work

## File Structure

```
/
├── index.html              ← SPA shell (just <div id="root">)
├── vite.config.js          ← React plugin
├── package.json
└── src/
    ├── main.jsx            ← ReactDOM.createRoot + BrowserRouter
    ├── App.jsx             ← <Routes> definition
    ├── index.css           ← Global tokens, reset, typography
    ├── components/
    │   ├── Nav.jsx         ← Logo + links, useLocation for active state
    │   ├── Footer.jsx
    │   ├── ProjectCard.jsx ← Reusable card: image placeholder, title, tags
    │   └── AnimatedPage.jsx← motion.div wrapper for page enter/exit
    └── pages/
        ├── Home.jsx        ← Hero + blurb + 3 featured projects
        ├── Work.jsx        ← Full project grid
        ├── About.jsx       ← Bio + skills
        └── Contact.jsx     ← Form + email
```

## Routing (`[src/App.jsx](src/App.jsx)`)

```jsx
<Routes>
  <Route path="/"        element={<Home />} />
  <Route path="/work"    element={<Work />} />
  <Route path="/about"   element={<About />} />
  <Route path="/contact" element={<Contact />} />
</Routes>
```

## Animation Architecture (Framer Motion)

- `**AnimatedPage.jsx**` — wraps every page in a `motion.div` with `AnimatePresence` for enter/exit transitions (fade + slight Y shift)
- **Scroll reveals** — `useInView` hook + `motion.div` with `whileInView` for project cards and section headings
- **Stagger children** — `variants` with `staggerChildren` on the work grid so cards animate in sequentially
- **Hover states** — `whileHover={{ y: -4 }}` on project cards for a lift effect
- **Nav underline** — `motion.span` layout animation on the active nav indicator

## Key Notes

- `react-router-dom` uses `<Link>` instead of `<a>` for client-side navigation (no full page reloads)
- Placeholder project images are CSS `aspect-ratio: 4/3` divs with muted gradient backgrounds
- `package.json` scripts stay unchanged (`dev`, `build`, `preview`)
- `npm install` will be run after adding the new dependencies
